response.global_summary: This video features a promotional trailer for the 'hololive 3rd Generation Live' event, including a performance of their original song 'Bouken! Shuppatsu!'. The performers are Hololive VTubers Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, and Shiranui Flare. Following the song, Usada Pekora gives a short talk, followed by an ending screen. Lyrics for the song could not be located via the provided search tool.

scenes.description: The Hololive 3rd Generation members (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare) perform their original song 'Bouken! Shuppatsu!'. The song title and 'hololive 3rd Generation Live' are displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare

scenes.description: Usada Pekora speaks directly to the camera, talking about the event and the future.
An ending graphic displays, thanking the audience for watching the sneak peek of the 'hololive 3rd Generation Live'. Background music is instrumental.
